top_findings.summary: The skill requests and stores an extensive amount of personal and professional data (full name, email, phone number, exact location, LinkedIn/GitHub/personal website URLs, detailed work experiences with highlights and technologies, projects, education including GPA and coursework, categorized skills, certifications, awards, publications, volunteer work, languages spoken, and interests) that exceeds what is strictly necessary for generating tailored, one-page resumes. While some of this data may appear on resumes, collecting and maintaining a comprehensive structured database of a user's entire professional profile—including potentially sensitive details like phone numbers, exact locations, and academic records—goes beyond the stated purpose of creating role-specific resumes and poses unnecessary privacy risks.
top_findings.impact: OVERREACH: Data Over-collection - The skill requests and stores an extensive amount of personal and professional data (full name, email, phone number, exact location, LinkedIn/GitHub/personal website URLs, detailed work experiences with highlights and technologies, projects, education including GPA and coursework, categorized skills, certifications, awards, publications, volunteer work, languages spoken, and interests) that exceeds what is strictly necessary for generating tailored, one-page resumes. While some of this data may appear on resumes, collecting and maintaining a comprehensive structured database of a user's entire professional profile—including potentially sensitive details like phone numbers, exact locations, and academic records—goes beyond the stated purpose of creating role-specific resumes and poses unnecessary privacy risks.
